title: capura alata
intro: Capura alata, also known as the 'winged leaf' or 'winged tongue', is a species of plant in the Annonaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Capura alata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for its medicinal use.
